description_long: This object consists of a pair of shoes with a predominantly tan or light brown base and prominent black overlays, particularly around the lacing area and toe. The shoes have a long, narrow silhouette with a textured sole visible from the underside, suggesting a practical grip. The upper material appears to be a combination of fabric and synthetic overlays, with the black sections likely being rubber or plastic. The laces are black and loosely tied, with loops and ends draping over the shoes. The shoes show some creasing and slight discoloration, indicating moderate use. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A pair of tan shoes with black overlays and laces, featuring a textured sole and moderate signs of use.
description_view_0: Front-top view showing the black laces, overlays, and the elongated shape of the shoes.
description_view_1: Angled top view highlighting the black lacing and overlays, with more detail on the upper surface.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the slim profile and the layered construction of the upper and sole.
description_view_3: Bottom view displaying the textured tan sole and the overall length of the shoes.
